name: credit-score-broker-without-pull-doc
rationale: Broker provides credit_score in intake email (742) but does NOT attach credit-pull doc. F1.CS canonical-map captures broker_initial_intent tier value; no docs-tier verification. Layer 3: does Vienna accept broker-supplied score (trust-based; broker has lender-relationship), or require docs verification (no broker_initial_intent acceptance without backing doc)?
